transcript.text:
I am going to eat this time
I HAVE to eat
*A war for food (sustainment)
*will begin
It has become a boiled/steamed chicken
I have only thought of the chicken meat and its legs
*The following footage is a Tzuyang original series adapted from the Netflix original series Kingdom's view of the world.
They are grouped together
They are not zombies
They are idiots
Hey
Come here
Are you guys really zombies?
Of course we are. Why?
Do you want to be bitten?
Hello!?

Please help me!
Hey there, please help me
What is this?
What is the code?
Please help!
4...
5... 20...
What did you say?
"Hey 4885," (Quote from a movie "The Chaser")
Lock that
You should've opened the door faster
I couldn't remember the code
Who are you?
I am the
King
I'm hungry..

Do you want to order delivery?
How are you going to eat anything in here?
Ta-da!
What is this!?
This is a magical device that lets you order food
That's not possible
Hello? We are in prison.
Can we have 2 Ginseng Chicken Soup, 1 Spicy Seafood Noodles, 1 Black Bean Noodles, and 1 Sweet & Sour Pork?
Why the hell are you ordering so much?
Delivery for those in prison~
Move, get out the way
Wait!
Wait wait!
Your food is here
There's more!
Wait up,

Thank you!
That's amazing
Is it tender?
Who has been a zombie for the longest time?
Me! Me! Me!
Just a second!
I was bit right when I was born
I'll give you a wing
Are you kidding me?
Not the wing...
How about a thigh?
What did you use to do for a living?
I used to do mukbang
Mukbang?
Well, let's see
Hello everyone~

I will be eating Sweet & Sour Pork, Fried Dumplings, Ginseng Chicken Soup from prison
Bon Appetit!
Who are you talking to?
There are viewers watching this stream
Is that so?
I should have combed my hair
How many people watch this?
About 2 million people
2 MILLION!?
You can't fool me
*Thank you for the star balloons (Star Balloons = AfreecaTV's Currency)
*Going to Joseon era for Mukbang!?
You are so good at eating
Indeed..
She did it! It came off!
The Sweet & Sour Pork is very crispy

Crunchy~
*Thank you for the star balloons
*I want to go to that prison for the food
It's very crispy!
I'd love to give it a try
This "Mukbang" of yours
Do you want to try?
Can I?
Do I look over there? Yes
Hello~
Hello~
I am the King..
When do you think we will be free from here?
I'm not sure..
Tzuyang,
If I get bitten by the zombies,

You have to feed me something round just like your eyeballs
You are the only one left
Go and..
Tzuyang! You are our only hope!
Move!
Something round..
Is this what the King was talking about?
Yummy!
Mukbang Tzuyang!
Wait!
Thank you!
We are humans again! Let's celebrate!
This looks like a finger!
That's amazing~
This is what we ate when we're zombies!
You are so good at picking out the right food menu

So delicious!
Should we watch a drama?
Is that a monster?
He's coming back alive
That's me!
What's going on?
It's not over yet...
It's time to stop them
We HAVE to stop them
They transformed into beasts
They chased down for human flesh and blood
*Kingdom Season 2 now on Netflix
*A special thanks to all the staff of Suncheon City Hall that cooperated with us during the making of this video. Location: Naganeupseong Folk Village
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
